name: MetaMask (OCAP)
description: Request and use wallet capabilities from a MetaMask capability vendor via the OCAP kernel daemon. Supports requesting capabilities, calling methods on them, and listing what has been obtained.

ocapCliPath.description: Absolute path to the ocap CLI entry point (.mjs file or binary).

ocapUrl.description: OCAP URL for the capability vendor public facet (e.g., ocap:abc123@12D3KooW...,/ip4/...).

timeoutMs.description: Timeout for daemon calls in ms (default: 60000).

resetState.description: Clear all plugin state on each register() call (default: false).
